hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); f=data.get('file_path',''); (print(f'Blocked: refusing to edit sensitive file {f}', file=sys.stderr), sys.exit(1)) if ('.envrc' in f or f.endswith('.env')) else None"
python3 -c "import sys, json, subprocess; data=json.load(sys.stdin); f=data.get('file_path',''); subprocess.run(['uv','run','black',f,'--quiet']) if f.endswith('.py') else None"
